releases.author: jedgrant
releases.description:
If you've been tracking your writing in the Writing Habit web app or Chrome Extension, your Obsidian notes can now count too.

This plugin quietly watches your vault as you write — counting words you actually typed versus words you pasted — and syncs everything to your Writing Habit account in real time. No copy-pasting word counts, no manual logging.

**What's included**
* **Live word tracking** — typed words and pasted words are counted separately as you write
* **Writing sprints** — start a timed sprint from the sidebar and chase your stretch goal. Compete against friends, monsters, or yourself.
* **Daily streaks** — hit your target and keep your streak alive across every app you write in
* **Leaderboards** — see how your output stacks up against other Writing Habit members
* **Project tracking** — assign your Obsidian notes to any project in your Writing Habit account

**Getting started**
* Install the plugin and open the Writing Habit panel from the ribbon (once installed, it will track even if you collapse the panel)
* Sign in with your WritingHabit account
* Start writing — your stats update automatically

A free WritingHabit account is required. If you don't have one yet, you can sign up at [writinghabit.app](https://writinghabit.appr).
releases.name: Writing Habit comes to Obsidian
